content_body: The Pasta Market is a beautiful artisanal market offering home goods - candles, gift baskets, cutting boards, charcuterie boards, and more. Their intimate dining space offers delicious wine flights, gourmet charcuterie boards, tapas, pasta, and pizza. This hidden gem opens daily at 12 and closes an hour before the market closes. Restaurant is first come, first serve.
title: The Pasta Market
